case_number: criminal case in respect of a FIR No. 409/2016

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1716 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Nehrulal, Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Zulqarnain Talpur, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Syed Amir Hussain on behalf of SSP Jamshoro, SIP Nooruddin Sakhirani I/C CIA Jamshoro, SIP Syed Abdul Latif on behalf of SHO Kotri and ASI Zahid Hussain I/C PP Site Kotri, WHC Asghar Ali CIA Jamshoro. -.-.-. Parawise comments have been filed and according to learned A.A.G, a criminal case in respect of a FIR No. 409/2016 is pending adjudication before the concerned Court, in which son of petitioner namely Asad Jamal is the accused but presently is on pre-arrest bail, and challan in the case has been submitted in the Court. However, petitioner’s Counsel submits that police officials unnecessary visit his shop and it has become difficult for him to carry out his business in lawful manner. This petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials shall discharge their functions strictly in accordance with law without causing harassment to the petitioner. JUDGE Ali Haider
